concept: Forge a survival game where the player inhabits an abandoned mechanical heart that must pump resources throughout a colossal derelict machine to prevent complete shutdown. Different chambers require different fluids - oil for joints, coolant for processors, and electrical plasma for power systems - creating complex prioritization challenges as resource scarcity forces triage decisions. Automated defense systems mistake your maintenance activities for an infection, requiring careful timing and path planning to avoid detection. Restoration progress gradually awakens dormant machine subsystems that can either assist your efforts or create new hazards depending on the order of reactivation. The ultimate revelation shows you're actually restoring an ancient mechanical titan needed to defend against an imminent threat to all mechanical life.
